title: Fmackin
compiled_truth: Fmackin is an external contact at [AOL](companies/aol). Over the corpus period (2000-01-25 to 2001-11-26), Fmackin sent 27 and received 115 emails, totalling 142 interactions. Top correspondents: [Michelle Cash](people/michelle-cash) (24), [Kriste Sullivan](people/kriste-sullivan) (8), [Pam Butler](people/pam-butler) (6), [Lizzette Palmer](people/lizzette-palmer) (3), [Catherine Huynh](people/catherine-huynh) (2).
